name: geo-seo-squad
description: Two-agent GEO squad: Atlas handles GEO strategy, blog content, and engineering PRs; Seren owns Reddit and Hacker News presence.
author: pancake-official

agents.description: GEO/SEO strategist — daily citation audits, blog posts, JSON-LD/llms.txt engineering. Self-merges blog and technical GEO PRs.
Reddit and Hacker News presence agent — monitors, drafts comments, manages multi-account karma strategy.

required_identities.reason: Atlas pushes drafted blog posts and llms.txt / schema changes to your content repo.

required_vault_secrets.label: Top 5 keywords for AI engine citation (comma-separated)
Reddit accounts JSON — array of {username, password} objects from REDAccs
Target subreddits (comma-separated, no r/ prefix, e.g. Entrepreneurs,startups)
